title: CVE-2026-32760 - File Browser Self Registration Grants Any User Admin Access Whe

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-32760 - File Browser Self Registration Grants Any U

            - '*defaults.perm.admin*'

level: high
